Name: Average time for Accepted + Wait - Vendor across all process variants containing this activity

Name: Total time spent in Accepted + Wait - Vendor compared to the total time of Completed + In Call within the same cases
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait - Vendor' and activity 'Completed + In Call'

Name: Minimum time for Accepted + Wait - Vendor in variants that also include Completed + In Call
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity Accepted + Wait - Vendor and the end of the case

Name: Average duration of Accepted + Wait - Vendor when it directly precedes Completed + Resolved versus when it is followed by other activities
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait - Vendor' and activity 'Completed + Resolved'

Name: Time from Accepted + Wait - Vendor to Completed + In Call in cases where both activities occur

Name: Elapsed time between Queued + Awaiting Assignment and Accepted + Wait - Vendor in variants that lead to Completed + In Call
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' and activity 'Accepted + Wait - Vendor'

Name: Cycle time of Accepted + Wait - Vendor grouped by country
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait - Vendor' and the end of case grouped by the last value of organization country

Name: Time from Accepted + In Progress to Accepted + Wait - Vendor in variants that eventually reach Completed + In Call

Name: Duration of Accepted + Wait - Vendor compared to the duration of Accepted + Wait - User within identical process variants

Name: Time between Accepted + Wait - Vendor and the next occurrence of Accepted + In Progress in looping variants

Name: Average time for Accepted + Wait - Vendor in variants that do not contain Completed + In Call

Name: Time from case start until Accepted + Wait - Vendor in cases that later perform Completed + In Call

Name: Duration of Accepted + Wait - Vendor relative to the total case resolution time in variants ending with Completed + Closed
